title: Manufacturing Engineer - JK Tyre - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - JK Tyre - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
